title: Fix currentStepIdx set to last step — step-through never works
description:
handleOperation at DataStructuresModule.tsx:5918 sets `currentStepIdx: result.steps.length - 1`, which immediately shows the final step. The Step Forward button at :2642 is `disabled={stepIdx >= totalSteps - 1}`, so it's always disabled after an operation. The entire step-by-step educational feature is non-functional.

Fix: Change :5918 to `currentStepIdx: 0` so operations start at step 1, and the user can step through to the end. Same change at :5316 in applyResult.
acceptanceCriteria: After any operation, currentStepIdx is 0 (first step)
Step Forward button is enabled and advances through steps
Final state is only shown after stepping through all steps
The step counter shows '1/N' immediately after operation

title: Fix Heap 'Search' button which silently calls heapBuild instead
description:
At DataStructuresModule.tsx:5470, the heap's `op === 'search'` branch calls `heapBuild(vals, prev.heap.type)` instead of searching. Comment at :5470 says 'Build heap from scratch to demonstrate heapify'. User clicks Search 42, entire heap is replaced.

Fix: Rename operation to 'build' in DS_CATALOG at index.ts:507. Add 'peek' operation. Update handleOperation heap branch.
acceptanceCriteria: Heap operations are 'insert', 'delete', 'peek', 'build' in DS_CATALOG
'Build' button rebuilds the heap (current behavior, now correctly labeled)
'Peek' button highlights root and shows min/max value
No button label says 'Search' for Heap

title: Fix Fibonacci/Binomial Heap 'Search' which does random decrease-key
description:
At DataStructuresModule.tsx:5699-5710 (FibHeap) and :5881-5891 (BinomialHeap), `op === 'search'` picks a random node via `Math.random()` and calls `fibDecreaseKey`/`binomialDecreaseKey`. User types '42' and clicks Search expecting to find value 42; instead a random node's key changes.

Fix: Rename 'search' to 'decreaseKey' in DS_CATALOG for both. Add 'findMin' operation. Make decrease-key use user input (not random).
acceptanceCriteria: Operations are 'insert', 'extractMin', 'findMin', 'decreaseKey'
'Find Min' highlights minimum node and shows its value
'Decrease Key' takes a user-specified node and new key value
No operation picks random nodes

title: Expose WAL crash/recover/checkpoint/truncate operations in UI
description:
DS_CATALOG at index.ts:647 defines WAL operations as only `['insert', 'search']`. The lib exports walCrash, walRecover, walCheckpoint, walTruncate (imported at DataStructuresModule.tsx:117-120) but none are called in handleOperation :5633-5645. WALCanvas at :3101 already renders crashed/recovered states. The WAL's core educational purpose (crash→recovery) is inaccessible.

Fix: Add 'checkpoint', 'crash', 'recover', 'truncate' to WAL operations at index.ts:647. Add handler branches in handleOperation.
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 WAL operations (append, read, checkpoint, crash, recover, truncate) have buttons
Crash button sets crashed=true, UI shows red CRASHED banner (already rendered at :3118-3121)
Recover button replays entries after checkpoint
Checkpoint and Truncate buttons work with step visualization

title: Expose LSM Tree flush and compact operations in UI
description:
DS_CATALOG at index.ts:549 defines LSM operations as `['insert', 'search']`. `lsmFlush` and `lsmCompact` are imported at DataStructuresModule.tsx:83-84 but never called in handleOperation :5515-5528. The flush/compact cycle is the core educational concept of LSM trees.

Fix: Add 'flush' and 'compact' to operations at index.ts:549. Add handler branches calling lsmFlush and lsmCompact.
acceptanceCriteria: Flush button moves memtable data to Level 0 SSTables
Compact button merges SSTables across levels
Both operations produce step visualizations
Users can observe the full write→flush→compact lifecycle

title: Expose all 4 CRDT types in UI (G-Counter, PN-Counter, LWW-Register, OR-Set)
description:
The CRDT engine (crdt-ds.ts, 527 lines) implements 4 types but handleOperation at :5808-5827 only uses G-Counter. State field `crdtCounter: GCounterState` at :366 has no counterpart for PN/LWW/OR-Set. pnCounterCreate/Increment/Decrement/Merge are imported at :177-181 but never called.

Fix: Add state fields for all 4 CRDT types. Add a CRDT sub-type selector in the canvas. Wire handleOperation for each type. Extend CRDTCanvas.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can switch between G-Counter, PN-Counter, LWW-Register, OR-Set
Each type has appropriate context-specific operation buttons
Each type has distinct visualization showing per-node state
Merge operations show type-specific semantics

title: Remove phantom empty controls bar div from DSCanvas component
description:
DSCanvas at DataStructuresModule.tsx:4762-4764 renders `
{/* Controls are rendered from the parent */}
` — an empty div with a visible bottom border. The actual controls are rendered in the parent at :6347-6358. This creates a ~36px dead space bar above the visualization. Fix: Remove lines 4760-4764 and the outer wrapper div at 4760. Simplify DSCanvas to just render the visualization area div at :4766.
acceptanceCriteria: No empty border-b div appears above the visualization
Controls render once (from parent) not twice
No vertical space wasted above canvas area

title: Add step-backward, auto-play, and speed control to playback
description:
Only handleStepForward exists at :6334-6339. No step-backward, auto-play, speed control, or seek bar. After fixing DST-036, users can step forward but need richer controls.

Fix: Add handleStepBackward (decrement stepIdx, min 0). Add isPlaying state + timer. Add speed selector (0.5x/1x/2x/4x). Add seek range input. Update DSControls :2561-2684 with new buttons.
acceptanceCriteria: Step backward works and updates visualization
Play/Pause auto-advances steps at selected speed
Speed selector offers 0.5x, 1x, 2x, 4x
Seek bar allows jumping to any step
Auto-stop at last step with icon reset

title: Fix Reset to only clear the active data structure, not all 33
description:
handleReset at DataStructuresModule.tsx:6290-6332 explicitly resets ALL 33 DS state fields. A user viewing BST who clicks Reset also loses their hash table, trie, etc.

Fix: Only reset the active DS's fields plus shared state (steps, currentStepIdx, log). Add a separate 'Reset All' option with confirmation.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking Reset while viewing Array only resets arrayData + shared state
Other DS states are preserved across reset
Each of 34 DS resets correctly when active

title: Replace hardcoded dark-mode hex colors in SVG with theme-aware values
description:
6 canvases use `fill: '#1f2937'` for node backgrounds: BST :899, AVL :1059, Heap :1548, Splay :4145, Treap :4471, B-Tree :4696. Also `#111827` at Trie :1690 for edge label rect. These are invisible on light backgrounds.

Fix: Use CSS variable approach via style prop, e.g., `fill: 'var(--color-elevated)'` or compute from theme context.
acceptanceCriteria: No hardcoded hex in SVG fill/stroke for structural elements
Tree visualizations readable in both dark and light themes
Highlight colors (DS_COLORS :399-414) can remain as accent colors

title: Use context-sensitive operation labels instead of generic insert/delete/search
description:
9+ DS have misleading generic labels from DS_CATALOG operations arrays. Examples: Heap 'search'=build (:5470), Segment Tree 'insert'=update (:5745), Fenwick 'insert'=update (:5777), Vector Clock 'insert'=local event (:5830), Merkle 'insert'=build (:5557), WAL 'insert'=append (:5633), Rope 'insert'=concat (:5647).

Fix: Update operations arrays in DS_CATALOG (index.ts:389-867) to use specific operation names. Update handleOperation switch branches. Update DSControls icon mapping at :2596-2608.
acceptanceCriteria: Every button label matches the actual operation
Union-Find has separate MakeSet and Union buttons
Consistent Hash has separate Lookup and Add Keys buttons
Icon mapping updated for new operation names

title: Deduplicate tree layout code — use shared layoutTree from tree-layout.ts
description:
Three nearly identical layout functions: layoutBST :772-789, layoutAVL :935-951, layoutRB :1105-1121. Three identical edge-collection functions: collectEdges :801-816, collectAVLEdges :954-969, collectRBEdges :1124-1139. Meanwhile lib/data-structures/tree-layout.ts [31] (355 lines) exports layoutTree() and is never imported.

Fix: Use layoutTree() for BST, AVL, RB canvases. Delete ~150 lines of duplicate code. Ensure GenericTreeNode interface is compatible.
acceptanceCriteria: layoutBST, layoutAVL, layoutRB removed from DataStructuresModule.tsx
All tree canvases use shared layoutTree()
Visual output identical or improved
tree-layout.ts imported and used

title: Add highlight color legend to visualization area
description:
DS_COLORS at DataStructuresModule.tsx:399-414 defines 12 highlight states (comparing, visiting, inserting, deleting, found, hashing, etc.) used across all canvases. No legend is shown. Red-Black tree has an inline custom legend at :1187-1194 for node colors — generalize this pattern.

Fix: Create collapsible legend component. Only show colors relevant to current DS. Position in canvas corner.
acceptanceCriteria: Legend appears in canvas area showing color meanings
Only shows colors used by current DS operations
Collapsible to not obstruct visualization
RB Tree inline legend replaced by shared component

title: Add engaging empty-state CTAs with example data for all DS
description:
20+ empty states show only 'X is empty'. Examples: ArrayCanvas :519-521, BSTCanvas :818-820, HeapCanvas :1509-1513, TrieCanvas :1654-1659. No suggested actions, no Quick Start button.

Fix: Add descriptive text + 'Load Example' button calling handleRandom. E.g., 'BST is empty. Insert some values to see the tree grow!' with a button.
acceptanceCriteria: All empty states have descriptive text + CTA button
CTA button triggers handleRandom for the active DS
Text is educational and action-oriented

title: Add context-sensitive input placeholders and validation for all DS
description:
DSControls at :2603 uses generic placeholder `needsKey ? 'key / element' : 'value'` for all DS. R-Tree needs 'x,y' format, Segment Tree needs index+delta, Vector Clock needs node IDs. Extra input at :2618-2619 also generic.

Fix: Create placeholder map Record<ActiveDS, {value: string, extra?: string}>. Apply contextual placeholders. Add inline validation for format errors.
acceptanceCriteria: R-Tree shows 'x, y' placeholder, Segment Tree shows 'index'
Extra input shows contextual placeholder
Invalid format shows inline error instead of silent NaN fallback

title: Add Rope visualization edge lines between parent and child nodes
description:
RopeCanvas at DataStructuresModule.tsx:3267-3315 renders nodes grouped by depth as divs but draws no connecting lines. The RopeFlatNode type has parentId field (from rope.ts). Other tree canvases (BST :861-887, AVL :986-1058) draw SVG edge lines.

Fix: Convert to SVG-based layout or overlay SVG lines between parent/child positions using parentId from flat data.
acceptanceCriteria: Lines connect each Rope node to its parent
Internal nodes show connections to children
Edge highlighting works during step playback

title: Expose Linked List tail-insert and insert-at operations
description:
handleOperation at :5384-5386 always calls llInsertHead. llInsertTail is imported at :44 but never called. llInsertAt is also available from linked-list.ts.

Fix: Add 'insertHead', 'insertTail', 'insertAt' as separate operations in DS_CATALOG. Wire each to the corresponding lib function. 'insertAt' uses extra input for index.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can insert at head, tail, or specific index
Each produces correct step visualization
Insert-at validates index bounds

title: Fix Trie layout to preserve parent-child subtree proximity
description:
layoutTrie at DataStructuresModule.tsx:1600-1625 spaces nodes evenly per depth via `spacing = width / (nodes.length + 1)`. Nodes from different subtrees interleave horizontally. Compare to BST layout :772-789 which halves spread to keep subtrees together.

Fix: Use recursive layout that centers each node over its children's positions (Reingold-Tilford variant) or adapt shared layoutTree from tree-layout.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: Child nodes positioned directly below parent
Separate subtrees don't interleave
Large tries (20+ words) remain readable

title: Add pseudocode panel to Properties sidebar for core DS operations
description:
DSProperties at :5051-5215 shows name, description, size, complexity but no pseudocode. This is a significant educational gap vs VisuAlgo.

Fix: Add collapsible Pseudocode section below complexity table. Map DS operations to pseudocode lines. Highlight current line based on step description. Start with 10 core DS.
acceptanceCriteria: Pseudocode section in Properties for at least 10 DS
Pseudocode lines highlight in sync with current step
Section is collapsible
Font is monospace with keyword coloring

title: Add keyboard shortcuts for core operations
description:
Only keyboard interaction is Enter on input at :2607-2613 which fires first operation. No shortcuts for step, reset, random, or DS switching.

Fix: Add useEffect keydown listener. Right/Left arrows for steps, Space for play/pause, R for random, Escape for reset. Disable when input focused.
acceptanceCriteria: Arrow keys navigate steps
Space toggles play/pause (after DST-043)
R generates random data
Shortcuts disabled when typing in inputs

title: Cap operation log array to prevent unbounded growth
description:
At DataStructuresModule.tsx:5919, `log: [...prev.log, logMsg]` appends without limit. After 1000 operations, the spread creates a 1000-element array copy each time.

Fix: Change to `log: [...prev.log.slice(-200), logMsg]` to cap at 200 entries.
acceptanceCriteria: Log array never exceeds 200 entries
Oldest entries are dropped
Performance doesn't degrade after many operations

title: Wire SystemRoleSelector 'Open in System Canvas' to actual navigation
description:
At SystemRoleSelector.tsx:402-405, the bridge button only does `console.log`. Same for P95LatencyCalculator.tsx:325-335. These look like functional buttons but produce no user-visible result.

Fix: Navigate to the System Design module with the selected DS pre-configured, or show a tooltip explaining the feature is coming soon.
acceptanceCriteria: Button either navigates to System module or shows 'Coming soon' toast
No console.log-only buttons visible to users
If navigation works, correct DS context is passed

title: Add ARIA attributes and screen reader support to all DS canvases
description:
Grep for 'aria-' in DataStructuresModule.tsx: 0 results. No role='img' on SVG canvases (BST SVG at :860). No aria-label on buttons (:2575-2583). No aria-live for step announcements. No aria-current on sidebar (:481-489).

Fix: Add role='img' + aria-label to SVGs. Add aria-label to buttons. Add aria-live='polite' for step descriptions. Add aria-current to sidebar.
acceptanceCriteria: All SVG elements have role='img' with descriptive aria-label
All buttons have aria-label
Step descriptions announced via aria-live
Active DS in sidebar has aria-current

title: Add prefers-reduced-motion support to all Framer Motion animations
description:
Grep for 'reduced-motion' or 'useReducedMotion' in all module files: 0 results. ~80+ motion elements use `transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}` unconditionally.

Fix: Use framer-motion's useReducedMotion hook. Set duration to 0 when preferred. Apply to all motion.* elements.
acceptanceCriteria: Animations instant when prefers-reduced-motion enabled
No layout shift in reduced-motion mode
Normal animations unaffected otherwise

title: Split 6,379-line monolith into modular file structure
description:
DataStructuresModule.tsx is 6,379 lines containing 32 canvases, sidebar, controls, properties, bottom panel, 600-line handleOperation, 400-line handleRandom, layout utilities, types, and constants.

Target structure: ds-module/index.ts, useDataStructuresModule.ts, DSSidebar.tsx, DSControls.tsx, DSProperties.tsx, DSBottomPanel.tsx, DSCanvas.tsx, constants.ts, canvases/*.tsx, utils/*.ts.

Do AFTER all functional fixes to avoid merge conflicts.
acceptanceCriteria: No file exceeds 500 lines
Each component in its own file
All existing functionality preserved
TypeScript compiles with no new errors

title: Replace array-index React keys with stable identifiers in all canvases
description:
~15 locations use array-index keys: ArrayCanvas :569, BloomFilterCanvas :1297, DequeCanvas :2912, HeapCanvas :1568, and ~11 more. Can cause React reuse bugs during animations.

Fix: Use stable keys based on element value+position or generate IDs in data structures.
acceptanceCriteria: No React key based solely on array index
Keys stable across re-renders for same element
No animation flickering from key reuse

title: Add error boundaries around each DS canvas
description:
If any canvas throws during rendering (e.g., null pointer on edge case), the entire DS module crashes. No error boundaries exist (grep for ErrorBoundary: 0 results in module).

Fix: Create DSCanvasErrorBoundary. Wrap each canvas in DSCanvas routing (:4767-5075). Show friendly message + Reset button on error.
acceptanceCriteria: Canvas crash shows error message, not blank screen
Error message includes Reset button
Other DS continue working
Error logged to console

title: Remove unused lucide Play import from main module
description:
At DataStructuresModule.tsx:6, `Play` is imported from lucide-react but never used in the module's JSX. (WriteAmplificationVisualizer has its own Play import at :5.)

Fix: Remove `Play` from the import at :6.
acceptanceCriteria: Play removed from lucide import at line 6
No TypeScript compilation errors
No runtime regressions

title: Add sonification (audio feedback) for data structure operations
description:
Inspired by Sorting.at's audio. Map DS_COLORS highlight states (:399-414) to frequencies via Web Audio API. Play tones on each step activation. Add mute toggle in DSControls.

Fix: Create useSonification hook. Different tones for comparing/visiting/found/inserting/deleting. Mute button. Respect reduced-motion.
acceptanceCriteria: Tones play during step playback
Different operations produce different tones
Mute button silences all audio
No audio on page load

title: Add code panel showing synchronized TypeScript/Python implementation
description:
Add tabbed code panel in bottom panel area showing implementation code with line highlighting synchronized to visualization step. Bridges visual understanding to implementation.

Fix: Create DSCodePanel with language tabs. Store snippets as data. Map DSStep to code line ranges. Start with TypeScript for all 34 DS.
acceptanceCriteria: Code panel shows implementation for current DS and operation
Current line highlights sync with step
TypeScript code for all 34 DS operations
Panel togglable and doesn't interfere with log

title: Add shareable deep-link URLs for DS state
description:
Navigating away loses all state. No way to share a specific DS with preset data.

Fix: Encode activeDS in URL params (?ds=avl-tree). Read on mount. Optional data param (?data=42,15,73). Update URL on DS selection without reload.
acceptanceCriteria: URL updates when switching DS
Loading URL with ?ds=avl-tree opens AVL view
Browser back/forward navigates between selections
No page reload on navigation

title: Add DS comparison mode for side-by-side visualization
description:
Allow comparing two DS side-by-side (e.g., BST vs AVL with same insertions). Split canvas, apply ops to both, synchronized step playback.

Fix: Add Compare toggle in DSControls. Split canvas into L/R views. Second DS selector for right panel. Synchronized operations and playback.
acceptanceCriteria: Compare mode splits canvas into two views
Users select which DS to compare against
Operations applied simultaneously to both
Step playback synchronized

title: Add node click-to-inspect popover across all tree canvases
description:
No canvas element supports click or hover. Users can't click nodes for details.

Fix: Add onClick to SVG node elements in tree canvases (BST, AVL, RB, Heap, Trie, etc.). Show popover with node details (value, children, height, balance). Shared NodeTooltip component.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking tree node shows detail popover
Popover shows node-type-specific info
Clicking elsewhere dismisses popover
Works on all tree/graph canvases
